texto: We're fit, we're healthy, we eat right, we work out. 'Plus size model' does not mean that we're not healthy. Plus size is not glamourising obesity: it's about empowering. The message behind the fashion is feeling confident in whatever you're wearing.

texto: The plus size movement is not just about fashion; it's about body image, and if we're doing a shoot, they won't retouch us at all. That's the cool thing: there's no retouching at all because we want to give girls the truth, not a fabrication.

texto: People dwell so much on the little things, but why should they hold you back when you have the big things to look forward to? By exuding positive energy when dealing with your problems, you will exude it in your being in general. Treat yourself with love and you will exude love to others.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Hayley Hasselhoff que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “People dwell so much on the little things, but why should they hold you back when you have the bi…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, love, little-things, com foco em little-things.

By exuding positive energy when dealing with your problems, you will exude it in your being in general. Treat yourself with love and you will exude love to others.
